title: Google is not losing the AI race, Pichai tells doubters as cloud jumps 82%
summary: Alphabet posted revenue of $119.8 billion for the quarter, up 24% on a year earlier, while Google Cloud grew 82% to $24.8 billion, comfortably ahead of the roughly 64% analysts had pencilled in.
caption: output/2026-07-23/google-is-not-losing-the-ai-race-pichai-tells-doubters-as-cloud-jumps-.txt
